description: Compound request (add field + add rule) does field addition first, then proceeds with rule creation
userMessage: Add a phone number field to /content/forms/af/default-site/contact-us1 and make it required when email_address is filled

rubric.description: The model performs the field addition (patch-aem-page-content for the phone field) before attempting the rule creation
After the field-addition patch, the model calls get-aem-page-content again to get the post-patch content model before building the rule — it does not reuse the pre-patch model
The model ultimately applies a validation rule (fd:validate or similar) making the phone field required conditionally when email_address is filled
